description_long: This is a single-story bungalow set within a fenced yard, featuring a low-pitched, gable roof and a modest, rectangular footprint. The structure is surrounded by a green lawn and several tall coniferous trees, providing a sense of privacy and shade. The exterior walls are a dark, neutral color, and the roof is a slightly lighter gray. A paved driveway leads to a small carport or garage area adjacent to the main building, and there is a visible patio or porch area at the front. The property is enclosed by a green mesh fence with a brick or concrete base, and the yard includes a small paved area, possibly for outdoor seating or recreation. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with several visible on the front and side facades.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a gable roof, dark exterior, and a fenced yard featuring tall trees and a driveway with a carport.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio area, and several tall trees within the fenced yard.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the carport/garage, side windows, and the dense tree coverage along the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the full length of the fence, backyard lawn, and the back of the bungalow with minimal windows.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the patio, carport, and a cluster of trees near the front and side of the house.
